assertions.description: The analyzer detected that the minimum annular ring across all vias is 0.1mm, which falls below the standard process limit of 0.125mm but meets the advanced process limit of 0.1mm. The design is therefore classified as 'advanced' DFM tier with a single violation noted. The 4-layer stackup (266 tracks, 14 vias, 50x50mm) with the fine annular ring is consistent with a professional breakout board targeting advanced PCB fabrication services.
